projects.name: Tseung Kwan O Desalination Plant / 將軍澳海水化淡廠

overview.en: The first stage of the project is to construct a desalination plant and associated works with water production capacity at 135 000 m3 per day with provision for future expansion to double the capacity.
overview.tc: 第一階段工程旨在興建每日食水產量可達13萬5千立方米的海水化淡廠，以及相關設施，並會預留空間以便日後可擴展至雙倍的產水量。

page_title.en: Tseung Kwan O Desalination Plant / 將軍澳海水化淡廠
page_title.tc: Tseung Kwan O Desalination Plant / 將軍澳海水化淡廠

description.en: The first stage of the project is to construct a desalination plant and associated works with water production capacity at 135 000 m3 per day with provision for future expansion to double the capacity.
description.tc: 第一階段工程旨在興建每日食水產量可達13萬5千立方米的海水化淡廠，以及相關設施，並會預留空間以便日後可擴展至雙倍的產水量。

projects.name: In-situ Reprovisioning of Sha Tin Water Treatment Works – South Works – Advance Works and Main Works / 沙田濾水廠原地重置工程(南廠) ─ 前期工程及主項工程

overview.en: The project is to increase the treatment capacity of the South Works from 364 000 to 550 000 m3 per day to meet the anticipated increase in fresh water demand due to new housing developments and to reprovision the aged water treatment facilities.
overview.tc: 本工程旨在將南廠的處理能力從每日36萬4千立方米增加至55萬立方米，以滿足預計因新房屋發展而增加的食水需求，並重置老化的濾水設施。

page_title.en: In-situ Reprovisioning of Sha Tin Water Treatment Works – South Works – Advance Works and Main Works / 沙田濾水廠原地重置工程(南廠) ─ 前期工程及主項工程
page_title.tc: In-situ Reprovisioning of Sha Tin Water Treatment Works – South Works – Advance Works and Main Works / 沙田濾水廠原地重置工程(南廠) ─ 前期工程及主項工程

description.en: The project is to increase the treatment capacity of the South Works from 364 000 to 550 000 m3 per day to meet the anticipated increase in fresh water demand due to new housing developments and to reprovision the aged water treatment facilities.
description.tc: 本工程旨在將南廠的處理能力從每日36萬4千立方米增加至55萬立方米，以滿足預計因新房屋發展而增加的食水需求，並重置老化的濾水設施。

projects.name: Expansion of Tai Po Water Treatment Works / 大埔濾水廠擴展工程

overview.en: The expansion of Tai Po Water Treatment Works project increases its output capacity to 800 000 m3 per day and enhances the reliability and flexibility of the water supply and distribution system.
overview.tc: 大埔濾水廠擴建工程旨在提升其產水量至每天80萬立方米，以加強供水及分配系統的彈性和可靠性。

page_title.en: Expansion of Tai Po Water Treatment Works / 大埔濾水廠擴展工程
page_title.tc: Expansion of Tai Po Water Treatment Works / 大埔濾水廠擴展工程

description.en: The expansion of Tai Po Water Treatment Works project increases its output capacity to 800 000 m3 per day and enhances the reliability and flexibility of the water supply and distribution system.
description.tc: 大埔濾水廠擴建工程旨在提升其產水量至每天80萬立方米，以加強供水及分配系統的彈性和可靠性。

overview.en: WSD has completed establishment of a total of 2 400 Water Intelligent Network (WIN) district metering areas within the fresh water distribution network in the territory, with a view to monitoring leakage and maintaining the healthiness of the network.  WIN enhancement works are under construction.
overview.tc: 水務署於全港食水分配管網內已完成設立2 400個「智管網」監測區域，以監測水管滲漏及維持供水管網的健康狀況。「智管網」 的優化⼯程正在進⾏中。

description.en: WSD has completed establishment of a total of 2 400 Water Intelligent Network (WIN) district metering areas within the fresh water distribution network in the territory, with a view to monitoring leakage and maintaining the healthiness of the network.  WIN enhancement works are under construction.
